english translation text: Ziyārat ʿĀshūrāʾ

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللهِ،
english translation text:
Assalāmu ʿalayka yā Abā ʿAbdillāh,
Peace be upon you, O Abā ʿAbdallāh!

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ابْنَ رَسُوْلِ اللهِ،
english translation text:
Assalāmu ʿalayka yabna Rasūl illāh,
Peace be upon you, O son of Allāh’s Messenger!

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ابْنَ أَمِيْرِ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ وَابْنَ سَيِّدِ الْوَصِيِّيْنَ،
english translation text:
Assalāmu ʿalayka yabna Amīr il-Muʾminīna
wabna Sayyid il-Waṣiyyīn,
Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful and son of the Master of Successors!

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ابْنَ فَاطِمَةَ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ الْعَالَمِيْنَ،
english translation text:
Assalāmu ʿalayka yabna Fāṭimata Sayyidati Nisāʾ il-ʿĀlamīn,
Peace be upon you, O son of Fāṭima, Leader of the Women of the Worlds!

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ اللهِ وَابْنَ ثَارِهِ
english translation text:
Assalāmu ʿalayka yā thār Allāhi wabna thārihi,
Peace be upon you, O Allāh’s avenger and the son of His avenger,

wa-l-witr al-mawtūr,
the one who has yet to be avenged, and who did not get to avenge his murdered relatives!

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَى الْأَرْوَاحِ الَّتِي حَلَّتْ بِفِنَائِكَ،
english translation text:
Assalāmu ʿalayka wa ʿala-l-arwāḥ il-ladhī ḥallat bi-fanāʾik,
Peace be upon you and upon those souls who alighted in your courtyard!

arabic text: عَلَيْكُمْ مِنِّي جَمِيْعًا سَلَامُ اللهِ أَبَدًا مَا بَقِيتُ وَبَقِيَ اللَّيْلُ وَالنَّهَارُ.
english translation text:
ʿalaykum minnī jamiʿan salām ullāhi abadan mā baqītu wa baqī al-laylu wa-n-nahār.
Peace be upon you all from me so long as I live and so long as night and day endure!

Yā Abā ʿAbdillāhi
O Abā ʿAbdallāh!

laqad ʿaẓumat ir-raziyyatu
Terrible was the tragedy,

wa jallat wa ʿaẓumat il-muṣībatu bika
And terrible and grievous was the tribulation that befell you

ʿalaynā wa ʿalā jamīʿi ahl il-islām,
for us and for all the people of Islam,

Wa jallat wa ʿaẓumat muṣībatuka fi-s-samāwāti
And terrible and grievous was your tribulation in the heavens

ʿalā jamīʿi ahl is-samāwāt,
for all the inhabitants of the heavens.

Fa-laʿan Allāhu ummatan
So may Allāh curse the nation

arabic text: أَسَّسَتْ أَسَاسَ الظُّلْمِ وَالْجَوْرِ عَلَيْكُمْ أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ،
english translation text:
assasat asās aẓ-ẓulmi wa-l-jawri ʿalaykum Ahl al-Bayt,
who laid the foundations of your oppression and persecution, O People of the House!

arabic text: وَلَعَنَ اللهُ أُمَّةً دَفَعَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَقَامِكُمْ
english translation text:
Wa laʿan Allāhu ummatan dafaʿatkum ʿan maqāmikum
And may Allāh curse the nation who drove you from your station

arabic text: وَأَزَالَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَرَاتِبِكُمُ الَّتِي رَتَّبَكُمُ اللهُ فِيهَا،
english translation text:
wa azālatkum ʿan marātibikum ullatī rattabakum Ullāhu fīhā,
and brought you down from the ranks to which Allāh had assigned you!

Wa laʿan Allāhu ummatan qatalatkum,
And may Allāh curse the nation who killed you,

arabic text: وَلَعَنَ اللهُ الْمُمَهِّدِينَ لَهُمْ بِالتَّمْكِيْنِ مِنْ قِتَالِكُمْ،
english translation text:
Wa laʿan Allāh ul-mumahhidīna lahum bi-t-tamkīni min qitālikum,
And may Allāh curse those who paved the way for them and made it possible to fight you!

Bariʾtu il-Allāh wa ilaykum minhum
I repudiate them to Allāh and to you,

wa min ashyāʿihim wa atbāʿihim wa awlyāʾihim.
and their supporters, their followers, and their allies.

arabic text: يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللهِ إِنِّي سِلْمٌ لِمَنْ سَالَمَكُمْ،
english translation text:
Yā Abā ʿAbdillāhi innī silmun li-man sālamakum,
O Abā ʿAbdallāh, I am at peace with those who keep peace with you,

arabic text: وَحَرْبٌ لِمَنْ حَارَبَكُمْ إِلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ،
english translation text:
Wa ḥarbun li-man ḥārabakum ilā Yawm il-Qiyāma,
And I am at war with those who make war on you until the Judgement Day,

arabic text: وَلَعَنَ اللهُ آلَ زِيَادٍ وَآلَ مَرْوَانَ،
english translation text:
Wa laʿan Allāhu āla Ziyādin wa āla Marwān,
And may Allāh curse the houses of Ziyād and Marwān,

Wa laʿan Allāhu Banī Umayyata qāṭiba,
And may Allāh curse the Umayyad clan altogether!

Wa laʿan Allāh Ubna Marjāna,
And may Allāh curse Ibn Marjāna,

Wa laʿan Allāhu ʿUmar abna Saʿd,
And may Allāh curse ʿUmar ibn Saʿd,

Wa laʿan Allāhu Shimrā,
And may Allāh curse Shimr,

Wa laʿan Allāhu ummatan asrajat wa aljamat
And may Allāh curse the nation that saddled and bridled their horses

wa tanaqqabat li-qitālik.
and took up arms to fight you,

Bi-abi anta wa ummī,
May my father and my mother be your sacrifice!

Laqad ʿaẓuma muṣābī bik,
My grief for you has become unbearable,

arabic text: فَأَسْأَلُ اللهَ الَّذِي أَكْرَمَ مَقَامَكَ وَأَكْرَمَنِي بِكَ
english translation text:
Fa-asʾalu-llāha-l-ladhī akrama maqāmaka wa akramanī bika
So I beseech Allāh, who ennobled your station and ennobled me through you,

arabic text: أَنْ يَرْزُقَنِي طَلَبَ ثَارِكَ مَعَ إِمَامٍ مَنْصُورٍ
english translation text:
an yarzuqanī ṭalaba thārika maʿa imāmin manṣūrin
to permit me to avenge you in the company of a divinely supported leader

arabic text: مِنْ أَهْلِ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ.
english translation text:
min ahli bayti Muḥammadin ṣall Allāhu ʿalayhi wa ālih.
from the Household of Muḥammad, may Allāh bless him and his family.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي عِنْدَكَ وَجِيهًا بِالْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ
english translation text:
Allāhumm ajʿalnī ʿindaka wajīhan bi-l-Ḥusayni ʿalayh is-salāmu
O Allāh, make me eminent in your eyes through Ḥusayn, peace be upon him,

fi-d-dunyā wa-l-ākhira.
in this world and the next!

arabic text: يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللهِ إِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَى اللهِ وَإِلَى رَسُولِهِ
english translation text:
Yā Abā ʿAbdillāh, innī ataqarrabu il-Allāhi wa ilā Rasūlihi
O Abā ʿAbdallāh! I seek nearness to Allāh and to His Messenger

arabic text: وَإِلَى أَمِيْرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَإِلَى فَاطِمَةَ وَإِلَى الْحَسَنِ وَإِلَيْكَ
english translation text:
wa ilā amīr il-muʾminīn awa ilā Fāṭimata wa il-al-Ḥasani wa ilayka
And to the Commander of the Faithful, and to Fāṭima, and to Ḥasan, and to you,

bi-muwālātika wa bi-l-barāʾati mimman qātalaka
Through my loyalty to you and by repudiating those who fought you

wa naṣaba lak al-ḥarb,
and made war on you,

Wa bi-l-barāʾati mimman assasa asās
And by repudiating from those who laid the foundations

aẓ-ẓulmi wa-l-jawri ʿalaykum,
of your oppression and persecution.

Wa abraʾu il-Allāhi wa ilā Rasūlihī
And I repudiate, to Allāh and His Messenger,

mimman assasa asāsa dhālik,
those who laid the foundations of that

Wa banā ʿalayhi bunyānah,
and built their edifice upon it

arabic text: وَجَرَى فِي ظُلْمِهِ وَجَوْرِهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَعَلَى أَشْيَاعِكُمْ.
english translation text:
Wa jarā fī ẓulmihī wa jawrihī ʿalaykum wa ʿalā ashyāʿikum.
And continued in their oppression and persecution of you and your supporters.

Bariʾtu il-Allāh wa ilaykum minhum,
I repudiate them to Allāh and to you

arabic text: وَأَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَى اللهِ ثُمَّ إِلَيْكُمْ بِمُوَالَاتِكُمْ،
english translation text:
Wa ataqarrabu il-Allāh thumma ilaykum bi-muwālātikum,
And I seek nearness to Allāh and to you through loyalty to you

Wa muwālāti walīyyikum,
And fidelity to your allies

arabic text: وَالْبَرَاءَةِ مِنْ أَعْدَائِكُمْ وَالنَّاصِبِينَ لَكُمْ الْحَرْبَ،
english translation text:
Wa-l-barāʾati min aʿdāʾikum wa-n-nāṣibīna lakum ul-ḥarb,
And through disassociating from your enemies and those who make war on you,

Wa-l-barāʾati min ashyāʿihim wa atbāʿihim.
And by disassociating from their followers and supporters.

Innī simun liman sālamakum,
I am at peace with whoever keeps peace with you,

Wa ḥarbun liman ḥārabakum,
And I am at war with whoever makes war on you,

Wa waliyyu liman wālākum,
I am an ally of your ally

Wa ʿaduwwun liman ʿādākum,
And an enemy of your enemy

Fa-asʾal Ullāh al-ladhī akramanī bi-maʿrifatikum,
So I beseech Allāh, who ennobled me through knowing you

Wa maʿrifati awliyāʾikum,
And knowing your allies

Wa razaqan il-barāʾata min aʿdāʾikum
And nurtured me with disassociation from your enemies,

arabic text: أَنْ يَجْعَلَنِي مَعَكُمْ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ،
english translation text:
an yajʿalanī maʿakum fi-d-dunyā wa-l-ākhira,
To keep me with you in this world and the next,

arabic text: وَأَنْ يُثَبِّتَ لِي عِنْدَكُمْ قَدَمَ صِدْقٍ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ،
english translation text:
Wa ay-yuthabbita lī ʿindakum qadama ṣidqin fi-d-dunyā wa-l-ākhira,
And to steady me in a true stance with you in this world and the next,

arabic text: وَأَسْأَلُهُ أَنْ يُبَلِّغَنِي الْمَقَامَ الْمَحْمُوْدَ لَكُمْ عِنْدَ اللهِ،
english translation text:
Wa asʾaluhū ay-yuballighan il-maqām al-maḥmūda lakum ʿind Allāh,
And I beseech Him to let me reach the praiseworthy status you have with Allāh,

Wa ay-yarzuqanī ṭalaba thārī
And to grant me my request for vengeance

arabic text: مَعَ إِمَامِ هُدًى ظَاهِرٍ نَاطِقٍ بِالْحَقِّ مِنْكُمْ،
english translation text:
maʿa imāmi hudan ẓāhirim nāṭiqin bi-l-ḥaqqi minkum,
With a rightly-guided, manifest leader from you who proclaims the truth.

arabic text: وَأَسْأَلُ اللهَ بِحَقِّكُمْ وَبِالشَّأْنِ الَّذِي لَكُمْ عِنْدَهُ
english translation text:
Wa asʾal Ullāha bi-ḥaqqikum wa bi-sh-shaʾn il-ladhī lakum ʿindahu
I beseech Allāh by you and by the esteem you enjoy with Him

ay-yuʿṭīnī bi-muṣābī bikum
To recompense my grief for you

afḍala mā yuʿṭī muṣāban bi-muṣībatihī,
with the best recompense granted to one who suffers misfortune,

arabic text: مُصِيْبَةً مَا أَعْظَمَهَا وَأَعْظَمَ رَزِيَّتَهَا فِي الْإِسْلَامِ،
english translation text:
Muṣībatan mā aʿẓamahā wa aʿẓama razīyyatahā fi-l-Islām,
A misfortune terrible beyond compare, its sorrow peerless in Islam,

Wa fī jamīʿ is-samāwāti wa-l-arḍ!
And throughout the heavens and the earth!

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي فِي مَقَامِي هَذَا مِمَّنْ تَنَالُهُ مِنْكَ
english translation text:
Allāhum ajʿalnī fī maqāmī hādhā mimman tanāluhū minka
O Allāh as I stand here now, make me one of those who receives

ṣalawātun wa raḥmatun wa maghfira.
Your blessings, mercy, and forgiveness.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ مَحْيَايَ مَحْيَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
english translation text:
Allāhum ajʿal maḥyāya maḥyā Muḥammadin wa āli Muḥammad,
O Allāh let me live the life of Muḥammad and Muḥammad’s household,

Wa mamātī mamāta Muḥammadin wa āli Muḥammad.
And let me die the death of Muḥammad and Muḥammad’s household!

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ هَذَا يَوْمٌ تَبَرَّكَتْ بِهِ بَنُو أُمَيَّةَ
english translation text:
Allāhumma inna hādhā yawmun tabarrakat bihī Banū Umayyata
O Allāh, this is a day regarded as auspicious by the Umayyad clan,

wabnu Ākilat il-Akbād,
And by the son of the Eater of Livers,

arabic text: اللَّعِيْنُ ابْنُ اللَّعِيْنِ عَلَى لِسَانِكَ وَلِسَانِ نَبِيِّكَ
english translation text:
Al-laʿīn ubn ul-laʿīni ʿalā lisānika wa lisāni nabīyyika
The cursed son of the one cursed by your words and the words of your Prophet

ṣall Allāhu ʿalayhi wa ālih,
(May Allāh bless him and his family),

arabic text: فِي كُلِّ مَوْطِنٍ وَمَوْقِفٍ وَقَفَ فِيهِ نَبِيُّكَ
english translation text:
Fī kulli mawṭinin wa mawqifin waqafa fīhi nabīyyuka
On every occasion and in every situation Your Prophet encountered,

ṣall Allāhu ʿalayhi wa ālih.
(May Allāh bless him and his family).

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ الْعَنْ أَبَا سُفْيَانَ وَمُعَاوِيَةَ وَيَزِيدَ بْنَ مُعَاوِيَةَ،
english translation text:
Allāhum al-ʿan Abā Sufiyān awa Muʿāwiyata wa Yazīd abna Muʿāwiya,
O Allāh, curse Abā Sufiyān, Muʿāwiya, and Yazīd the son of Muʿāwiya,

ʿalayhim mink al-laʿnatu abad al-ābidīn,
May your curse be upon them forever and ever.

arabic text: وَهَذَا يَوْمٌ فَرِحَتْ بِهِ آلُ زِيَادٍ وَآلُ مَرْوَانَ
english translation text:
Wa hādhā yawmun fariḥat bihī ālu Ziyādin wa ālu Marwāna
On this day the houses of Ziyād and Marwān rejoiced

bi-qatlihim ul-Ḥusayna ṣalawāt Ullāhi ʿalayh.
For their killing of Ḥusayn, may Allāh’s blessings be upon him.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ فَضَاعِفْ عَلَيْهِمْ اللَّعْنَ مِنْكَ وَالْعَذَابَ.
english translation text:
Allāhumma fa-ḍāʿif ʿalayhim ul-laʿna minka wa-l-ʿadhāb.
O Allāh, so double your curse upon them and your punishment.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ فِي هَذَا الْيَوْمِ،
english translation text:
Allāhumma innī ataqarrabu ilayka fī hādh al-yawm,
O Allāh, I do sincerely seek nearness to you on this day,

Wa fī mawqifī hādhā,
As I stand here,

Wa ayyāmi ḥayātī
And on all the days of my life,

bi-l-barāʾati minhum,
By repudiating them,

Wa-l-laʿnati ʿalayhim,
And sending curses upon them,

Wa bi-l-muwālāti li-nabīyyika wa āli nabīyyika
And through loyalty to Your Prophet and the Household of your Prophet,

ʿalayhi wa ʿalayhim us-salām.
(Peace be upon him and them).
